keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Boris Sébastien Moltenis (Martinique) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Panama 1, Martinique 0. José Fajardo (Panama) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Adalberto Carrasquilla with a through ball.
Daniel Hérelle (Martinique) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Aníbal Godoy (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Panama 1, Martinique 0.
Substitution, Panama. César Samudio replaces Luis Mejía.
Goal!  Panama 2, Martinique 0. Ismael Díaz (Panama) with an attempt from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Eduardo Guerrero with a cross.
Substitution, Panama. Jovani Welch replaces Aníbal Godoy.
Substitution, Panama. Kahiser Lenis replaces Eduardo Guerrero.
Substitution, Martinique. Gabriel Bilon replaces Enrick Reuperné.
Substitution, Martinique. Andy Marny replaces Karl Fabien.
Substitution, Panama. Cecilio Waterman replaces José Fajardo.
Substitution, Martinique. Carlo Rabathaly replaces Daniel Hérelle.
Substitution, Martinique. Ambroise Nelson Felicitet replaces Jérémy Corinus because of an injury.
Jovani Welch (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Panama. Cristian Martínez replaces Adalberto Carrasquilla.
Substitution, Martinique. Davy Singama replaces Boris Sébastien Moltenis.
Cecilio Waterman (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Panama 3, Martinique 0. Cecilio Waterman (Panama) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Second Half ends, Panama 3, Martinique 0.
